name: api-vampi
description: Internal must-find fixture for the api asset. Deploy VAmPI (erev0s/vampi) and point target at its OpenAPI spec. openapi_spec_ingest ingests the spec; schemathesis spec-fuzzes it; nuclei runs api signatures. NOTE: BOLA/BFLA/mass-assignment recall awaits the authz specialists (Akto wrapper or ADR — not built), so must_find is limited to what the current toolset reliably surfaces (schemathesis contract violations).

competitors.note: No neutral API-security leaderboard exists (unlike WAVSEP/OWASP-Benchmark). Reference points: VAmPI + crAPI working-group writeups; Salt Security / Wallarm / Akto self-published. Per CLAUDE.md §14.2 this fixture pairs with the anti-overfit source-grep guard so api recall isn't tuned to VAmPI/crAPI path heuristics (the strix iter-17.5 overfit trap).
